dialog_history.content: Hello, how can I help you?
I have been experiencing a productive cough with yellow-green sputum and significant dyspnea for the past four days. I also have a fever of 38.7°C, chills, and right-sided pleuritic chest pain.
My fatigue is profound, and I have had a marked decrease in appetite. My pain level is currently a 5 out of 10.
I take lisinopril for hypertension, metformin for my type two diabetes, and atorvastatin for cholesterol. I have a known allergy to penicillin, which causes a rash.
I am a former smoker with a 20 pack-year history, having quit a decade ago. I live alone and generally walk for 30 minutes most days to maintain my health.
[DDX] (Community-acquired pneumonia; Acute exacerbation of COPD; Pulmonary embolism; Congestive heart failure; Lung malignancy)
